data.name: Tropical Lust
data.detailed_description:
Travel to a tropical island where an old hotel awaits you, full of mysteries, problems, and temptations. You are the only man within hundreds of kilometers, and everyone will need your help.

Explore a small open world from a first-person perspective. Freely move around the island, visit the hotel, beach, lighthouse, and jungle, discover hidden paths, and unlock new ways to interact with characters.

This is active gameplay, not a visual novel. Repair the hotel, complete tasks for the female guests, make decisions, and take part in interactive scenes, including erotic mini-games.

Realistic characters and highly detailed environments create the atmosphere of a true resort adventure, where every action can lead to new events and intimate encounters.
data.about_the_game:

data.short_description: Fate brings you to a paradise island filled with mysteries and temptations. Explore the open world, interact with characters, and immerse yourself in an erotic first-person adventure with active gameplay and a treasure-hunting storyline.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 土耳其文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • 處理器: 3.6 GHz (4 core)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 1060 / AMD RX 590
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible
  • 備註: You may need to update the driver for your video card and sound card
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • 處理器: 3.7 GHz (10 core)
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia RTX 3060 TI / AMD RX 6700 XT
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible
  • 備註: You may need to update the driver for your video card and sound card
